problem id: f922f81c
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(3) XOR SHR(1)

examples:
  10111010 -> 10001101
  10001111 -> 00111111
  10110011 -> 11000001
  11010110 -> 11011011
  01111110 -> 11001111
  10100011 -> 01001001
  00011000 -> 11001100
  01011101 -> 11000110
  00010100 -> 10101010

query: 00000000
predicted answer: 00000000
